refined_caption: The hospital waiting room is overcrowded with patients sitting on the floor due to insufficient seating. The room appears to be filled beyond its capacity.
complaint_description: I visited the hospital today and was shocked to see the waiting room in such a state. There were not enough chairs for all the patients, and many were forced to sit on the floor. This is not only uncomfortable but also unhygienic and stressful for those waiting to receive medical attention.
voice_text: The waiting room is super crowded, people are sitting on the floor because there aren't enough seats.
